name: ops
description: Business operations command center for Claude Code. Manage communications, projects, infrastructure, and revenue from your terminal. Includes YOLO mode for autonomous business operation.

telegram_bot_token.description: Telegram Bot API token (from @BotFather). Optional — needed for /ops-comms telegram.

telegram_owner_id.description: Your Telegram user ID. Optional — needed for /ops-comms telegram.

sentry_org.description: Sentry organization slug (e.g. 'healify'). Optional — needed for /ops-triage.

linear_team.description: Default Linear team key (e.g. 'HEA'). Optional — needed for /ops-linear.

aws_region.description: Default AWS region for infrastructure checks (e.g. 'us-east-1'). Optional.
